decision_head_definitions.label: Biology context

decision_head_definitions.label: Intervention readiness
decision_head_definitions.name: intervention_readiness_score

decision_head_definitions.label: Failure burden
decision_head_definitions.name: failure_burden_score
decision_head_definitions.semantics: Higher means lower known clinical failure burden: no known structural failure baggage scores highest, while repeated or severe unresolved history scores lower.

decision_head_definitions.label: Directionality confidence
decision_head_definitions.name: directionality_confidence
decision_head_definitions.semantics: Confidence that the intervention direction is curated and coherent for the intended schizophrenia use case.

decision_head_definitions.label: Subgroup resolution
decision_head_definitions.name: subgroup_resolution_score
decision_head_definitions.semantics: Clarity around the population, illness stage, symptom subgroup, or cell-state context most likely to benefit.
